summary: Aligned packaged CodeWiki skill docs with current flat KB, compiler/build/validation contracts, agency terminology, and graph-first state model.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Skill router maps current compiler and validation workflows.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: skills/codewiki/SKILL.md routes feedback, plan, task, verify, architecture, research, and view-audit to current KB docs.
All stale related-doc refs replaced with current compilers, validation-gateway, builds, graph, roadmap, knowledge, overview, and file-structure docs.
Skill docs point agents back to .codewiki/kb, roadmap work truth, builds, graph, validation, and native tools instead of ADR/PRD duplicates.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Agency terminology and graph-first queue model reflected in skills.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: codewiki skill uses codewiki_agency and treats graph as primary read model; queue files are avoided unless an adapter proves a need.

validation_verdict.rationale: Skill docs align with current KB and source contracts; checks pass.

publication.recommended_commit_title: docs(skills): align CodeWiki skills with current KB contracts
publication.recommended_commit_body: Align packaged skills with the current flat KB, compiler/build/validation model, agency terminology, and graph-first generated state contract. Remove stale v2/nested compiler doc refs and update task evidence.
